title: Microsoft Foundry Practice Exam - Answer Key
notes: File nay tong hop cau hoi, dap an de xuat, va giai thich ngan de tao de thi thu.
Voi cac cau dang dropdown/drag-drop, truong answer se la gia tri can chon theo tung o tra loi.
Mot vai cau thieu boi canh tu screenshot goc, nen dap an duoc chon theo best-fit cua Microsoft Foundry/Azure AI pattern.

questions.question: You need to recommend a solution to support the planned changes and technical requirements for Agent1 to use the product information stored in storage1.

options.D: Azure Document Intelligence in Foundry Tools

questions.explanation: Dung de index va truy xuat du lieu san pham tu storage cho RAG/agent grounding.

questions.question: You need to configure personalized user interactions for Agent1. The solution must meet the business requirements.
questions.explanation: Ca nhan hoa qua cac phien va so thich nguoi dung thuong duoc xu ly bang memory.

questions.question: You need to ensure that the marketing department can generate videos by using the model deployed to Project2. How should you complete the Python code?
questions.explanation: OpenAI client video generation call dung dang `client.videos.create(...)`.

questions.question: You need to configure an indexing pipeline for Agent1 to retrieve the relevant product information in storage1. Which two built-in skills should you use?
questions.explanation: Can tach chunk va tao vector embeddings de truy hoi ngu nghia.

questions.question: You need to ensure that Agent1Dev Team can access Agent1. The solution must meet the security and compliance requirements. How should you complete the Python code?
questions.explanation: Dung Microsoft Entra credential thay vi key de phu hop yeu cau bao mat/compliance.

questions.question: You need to recommend a solution to assess the responses generated by Agent1 when the agent uses the product information stored in storage1.
questions.explanation: Groundedness danh gia cau tra loi co duoc ho tro boi nguon du lieu da truy hoi hay khong.

questions.question: You need to configure Agent1 to meet the security and compliance requirements.
questions.explanation: Prompt shields giup giam prompt injection, phu hop security requirement cho agent dung du lieu ben ngoai/noi bo.

questions.question: You need to configure the workflow to automatically evaluate the agent when a pull request (PR) is created and prevent branches from merging if the evaluation results do NOT meet the defined thresholds.

answer.if_threshold_not_met: Fail the workflow/job so branch protection blocks the merge

questions.explanation: CI/CD cho Foundry nen uu tien keyless auth bang OIDC; workflow fail se chan merge khi co branch protection.

questions.question: Evaluate the three statements about content harm defect rate, protected material evaluation, and severity thresholds.
questions.explanation: Giam muc severity cua content filter khong sua dataset fail trong auto RAI checks; medium threshold thuong bat duoc nhieu harm hon high; protected material metric khong phu thuoc threshold content harm do de bai.

questions.question: Implement responsible AI auditing for a multi-agent solution. What should you use for each requirement?
questions.explanation: Hierarchical spans cho phep ghi vet nested operations va metadata cua tool calls.

questions.question: You need to deploy a model from the model catalog to support real-time inference with key-based auth, REST API access, and no VM vCPU consumption.
questions.explanation: Serverless API cho real-time REST va khong dung vCPU quota cua VM trong subscription.

questions.question: Calls intermittently fail with HTTP 429 and some uploads fail with HTTP 400 file size exceeded. What should you do?

answer.HTTP 429: Implement exponential backoff and jitter in the retry logic
answer.HTTP 400: Split content into smaller files before uploading the files

questions.explanation: 429 can retry co kiem soat; loi size exceeded can chia nho file de nam trong gioi han dich vu.

questions.question: The agent uses a stored access key to retrieve secrets from an Azure key vault, which violates a keyless-credentials requirement. What should you configure?

answer.managed_identity_scope: Enable a managed identity at the smallest practical scope for the agent/project
answer.key_vault_authorization_method: Assign the Key Vault Secrets User role to the managed identity

questions.explanation: Keyless va least privilege thuong dung managed identity + RBAC role chi doc secrets.

questions.question: Project1 will contain multiple agents. Each agent will access the same Azure AI Search resource. You need to centrally manage the Azure AI Search credentials within Project1.

options.A: Disable key-based access control on the Azure AI Search resource.
options.B: Add a connection to the Azure AI Search resource.
options.C: Enable role-based access control (RBAC) for the Azure AI Search resource.
options.D: Create a managed private endpoint that connects to the Azure AI Search resource.

answer.text: Add a connection to the Azure AI Search resource.

questions.explanation: Foundry connection la cach quan ly tap trung credentials/cau hinh de dung lai qua nhieu agent.

questions.question: Map each requirement to the correct tool.
questions.explanation: Bing cho web current data, code interpreter cho tinh toan, file search cho uploaded documents.

questions.question: You need to configure a connection from Project1 to KV1 by using identity-based authentication. How should you complete the Bicep code?
questions.explanation: Ket noi Key Vault trong Foundry dung category AzureKeyVault va identity-based auth la AAD.

questions.question: You need to deploy a model that generates vector representations of text in documents and user queries.
questions.explanation: Vector representations cho search similarity duoc tao boi embedding model.

questions.question: Users report more 'No relevant information found' responses and periodic HTTP 429 errors during peak hours. You need to identify whether each issue is caused by model unavailability, resource limits, or inference failures.

answer.diagnostic_log_to_collect: Inference diagnostic logs / model invocation logs

questions.explanation: Can bat metrics va diagnostic logs o tang suy luan de phan biet rate limiting, model failures, va availability issues.

questions.question: Build a customer support solution with accurate, context-aware responses grounded in internal docs, deep multi-step reasoning across long contexts, and detailed natural language responses.
questions.explanation: Yeu cau reasoning sau, context dai, va response chi tiet phu hop voi LLM.

questions.question: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs the evaluation defined in File1 when a PR is opened.

options.A: Set model-deployment-name to the deployed model.
options.B: Set tenant-id to the Microsoft Entra tenant ID.
options.C: Set project-endpoint to the endpoint of the project.
options.D: Set evaluation-config to the path of the YAML file.

answer.text: Set evaluation-config to the path of the YAML file.

questions.explanation: Workflow can file evaluation bang tham so evaluation-config tro den YAML.

questions.question: Create a customer support agent that grounds responses only in company policy documents stored in curated repositories and retains customer preferences across separate chat sessions.
questions.explanation: Knowledge dung cho grounded curated repos; long-term memory theo user de giu preferences qua nhieu session.

questions.question: Client applications must display page-level citations that have bounding polygons for both text and images and extract tables spanning multiple pages. What should you add?

options.B: Azure Content Understanding in Foundry Tools

questions.explanation: Document Layout phu hop cho trich xuat cau truc, vi tri text/image, va bang qua nhieu trang.

questions.question: Configure Azure Document Intelligence in Foundry Tools to generate a Markdown output that preserves the sections and table structure of PDFs. The solution must minimize development effort.

options.A: Configure output=figures when you analyze the PDF.
options.C: Configure content=markdown when you analyze the document.

questions.explanation: Day la cau hinh SDK/API truc tiep de lay output Markdown co cau truc.

questions.question: The agent ingests scanned PDF vendor invoices that contain tables and embedded QR codes. You need content and layout extraction and QR-code detection without requiring an LLM deployment. Which built-in analyzer should you use?
questions.explanation: prebuilt-layout tap trung vao OCR/layout/tables/cau truc ma khong can model deployment bo sung.

questions.question: You need to ensure that users can query the index by using exact product names or codes and natural language descriptions of the products.
questions.explanation: Hybrid ket hop keyword/exact-match va vector/semantic retrieval.

questions.question: You plan to ingest and index PDF product manuals and need semantic similarity matching even when user wording differs from the manuals.
questions.explanation: Vector search la co che chinh de bat similarity theo nghia thay vi exact wording.

questions.question: Process mixed-format documents that contain scanned text, tables, and multicolumn layouts. The extracted content must preserve structure and be converted to Markdown for downstream reasoning. What should you configure first?

options.A: an Azure Language in Foundry Tools text analysis model deployment
options.C: an Azure Content Understanding in Foundry Tools analyzer
options.D: an Azure OpenAI Responses API call that uses a multimodal model

answer.text: an Azure Content Understanding in Foundry Tools analyzer

questions.explanation: Can analyzer de trich xuat co cau truc truoc khi downstream reasoning.

questions.question: Configure an ingestion job for a RAG pipeline that performs OCR on scanned PDFs, preserves tables/headings as structure-aware chunks, and stores page-number metadata with each chunk.

options.A: Use advanced data parsing to reingest the documents.
options.B: Use page-level OCR extraction and store each page as a single chunk.
options.D: Use basic parsing and fixed-size chunking.

answer.text: Use advanced data parsing to reingest the documents.

questions.explanation: Advanced parsing moi dap ung chunking co nhan thuc cau truc va metadata trang.

questions.question: Pipeline1 ingests scanned-image invoices from Azure Blob Storage. You need to enable users to search invoice data across the invoice fields. Which built-in skill should you add?
questions.explanation: OCR can trich text tu invoice images de search duoc cac truong hoa don.

questions.question: Use Azure Content Understanding to process digital PDFs with tables and hyperlinks. The extracted content is indexed for search and provided to a downstream agent in Markdown. Which built-in analyzer should you use for RAG-optimized layout and semantic structure?
questions.explanation: prebuilt-documentSearch huong den output toi uu cho search/RAG ingestion.

questions.question: You need to ensure that during indexing, images are extracted into a structure that can be used as input for the built-in OCR skill.

options.A: a skillset to run the OCR skill directly against the content field of the index
options.B: the outputFieldMappings parameter to write image data to a searchable field
options.C: an indexer to extract image data into a normalized_images collection

answer.text: an indexer to extract image data into a normalized_images collection

questions.explanation: normalized_images la dau vao chuan cho OCR skill trong Azure AI Search enrichment pipeline.

questions.question: Create a real-time voice interaction with low latency and turn-taking dynamics. You need both speech to text and text to speech.

options.A: Use speech translation to convert the audio into another language and return the translated text.
options.B: Use real-time speech to text for incoming audio and text to speech for agent responses.
options.C: Use batch transcription to convert the audio input and return text responses from the agent.
options.D: Use an embeddings model to encode the audio, and then decode the audio into text and speech.

answer.text: Use real-time speech to text for incoming audio and text to speech for agent responses.

questions.explanation: Dung real-time STT/TTS moi dap ung low latency voice conversation.

questions.question: App1 must support live, low-latency voice conversations, streaming audio input, and playback audio responses with approximately 100 ms latency. Which connection method should you use?
questions.explanation: WebRTC la lua chon chuan cho real-time audio streaming latency rat thap tren client apps.

questions.question: You are approaching the expiration date of a custom speech to text model deployed to a custom endpoint. What is the expected behavior when the model expires?

options.A: Speech recognition requests will continue to use the expired custom model until the model is removed manually.
options.B: The custom model will be deleted automatically when the model expires.
options.C: Speech recognition requests will fall back to the most recent base model for the same locale.
options.D: Speech recognition requests will return a 4xx error until a new custom model is deployed.

answer.text: Speech recognition requests will fall back to the most recent base model for the same locale.

questions.explanation: Custom model het han se khong tiep tuc duoc dung nhu cu; endpoint se fallback ve base model cung locale.

questions.question: Transcript segments often contain both English and Spanish, causing incomplete or incorrect translations. What should you do before sending segments to Translator?

options.A: Enable automatic language detection for the translation request.
options.B: Split the mixed-language segments into single-language segments and translate each segment separately.
options.C: Specify English as the source language in the translation request for all the segments.
options.D: Use document translation to translate the entire transcript as a single document.

answer.text: Split the mixed-language segments into single-language segments and translate each segment separately.

questions.explanation: Translator xu ly tot hon khi moi request co mot ngon ngu nguon ro rang.

questions.question: Configure an analyzer to output a generated JSON field that describes the color scheme of each video segment.
questions.explanation: Mo ta color scheme la generated semantic field va kieu du lieu phu hop la string.

questions.question: User messages contain both text and images. Currently image URLs are plain text. You need the model to process the image correctly.

options.A: Encode the image to base64 and include the encoded data inside the content string of the user message.
options.B: Set the user message content array to include items that have type: text and type: image_url.
options.C: Place the image URL inside the System Message and set type to image_url, so the model loads the image at initialization.
options.D: Add the image URL to the request metadata section, so the model can resolve the processing issue automatically.

answer.text: Set the user message content array to include items that have type: text and type: image_url.

questions.explanation: Multimodal message phai gui theo structured content array.

questions.question: The agent generates original images from user-supplied product photos. You need to ensure that generated images maintain the product identity and visual characteristics of the provided photo.

options.A: Set the input_fidelity parameter to high.
options.B: Decrease the value of the temperature parameter.
options.D: Include a prompt and input image in the request.

answer.text: Set the input_fidelity parameter to high.

questions.explanation: High input fidelity giu do trung thuc voi hinh anh tham chieu tot hon trong image generation/editing.

questions.question: Reviewers notice a small watermark in the top-right corner of some generated videos. You need to remove it without regenerating the videos.

options.A: Crop the video by using the size parameter.
options.B: Apply a mask-based inpainting edit to the affected part of the video.
options.C: Modify the original prompt to exclude watermarks.

answer.text: Apply a mask-based inpainting edit to the affected part of the video.

questions.explanation: Inpainting edit sua truc tiep vung watermark ma khong can generate lai toan bo.

questions.question: A support agent enables users to upload photos. You need to automatically classify uploaded images for harmful content and block content based on severity levels.

options.C: Apply keyword scanning to OCR output by using Azure Vision in Foundry Tools.

questions.explanation: Image moderation la co che dung de phan loai va chan harmful images theo severity.

questions.question: Build a Content Understanding pipeline to compare an invoice to its purchase order, validate against static vendor contract documents, and return a single structured output as a single analyzer endpoint.

options.A: a single-file task in standard mode that uses the vendor contract provided as an additional document during analysis
options.B: a multi-file task in pro mode that uses the vendor contract files as reference data
options.C: a single-file task in standard mode that uses confidence scores enabled for the extracted fields
options.D: a multi-file task in standard mode that uses the invoice and purchase order as input to the analyzer

answer.text: a multi-file task in pro mode that uses the vendor contract files as reference data

questions.explanation: Can xu ly nhieu tai lieu va reference data trong mot pipeline co ket qua tong hop.

questions.question: You need to connect to an Azure AI Search vectorized index so that complex questions can retrieve information from multiple chunks, multi-turn conversations influence retrieval planning, and retrievals run in parallel.
questions.explanation: Agentic RAG ho tro retrieval planning, multi-turn context, va fan-out retrieval tot hon classic RAG.

questions.question: Persist state by using a durable ID to ensure that the agent can automatically reuse the full interaction history across turns and sessions. Which runtime component should you use?
questions.explanation: Conversation la container ben vung cho history, tool calls, va outputs qua nhieu turns/sessions.

questions.question: In the visual builder, create a workflow between PolicyWriter and RiskReviewer that finalizes low-risk updates automatically, ensures predictable execution, and requires user approval for high-risk updates.

answer.approval_checkpoints: Add human approval only on the high-risk branch

questions.explanation: Workflow cho predictable execution; approval checkpoint nen dat o nhanh high-risk.

questions.question: A prompt agent is invoked from a Python service outside the Foundry portal. You need end-to-end tracing to capture latency breakdowns and exceptions across agent runs. Which two components can you use?
questions.explanation: OpenTelemetry cho instrumentation; Application Insights cho thu thap va xem traces/latency/exceptions.

questions.question: You need to update request parameters to improve output stability while maximizing reasoning quality.
questions.explanation: Temperature thap giam bien dong output; effort cao giu chat luong suy luan tot hon.

questions.question: Configure an evaluation for a RAG chat app and provide scores for groundedness, relevance, and harmful content categories. Which two evaluation categories can you use?
questions.explanation: AI quality (AI assisted) bao gom groundedness/relevance; risk and safety dung cho harmful content categories.

questions.question: Enable long-term memory so the agent can recall user preferences across separate conversations and isolate memories per authenticated user without the client manually generating user IDs.
questions.explanation: Scope theo userId de tach rieng theo user va giu memory qua nhieu conversation.

questions.question: Agent1 runs successfully, but Foundry Control Plane does not display values for error rates, runs, token usage, and the Traces tab is empty. What should you do?

options.A: Update Agent1 to a new version.
options.B: Assign a Log Analytics workspace to Agent1.
options.C: Restart Agent1 from Foundry Control Plane.

questions.explanation: Application Insights cung cap telemetry/traces de hien thi cac metric va trace trong control plane.

questions.question: App1 sends prompts directly to a model by using the Azure OpenAI Responses API and invokes the Azure AI Content Safety tool by using a Foundry connection within the same request. You need end-to-end visibility into each step of the request workflow.

options.A: Enable logging by using the client SDK for Content Safety.
options.B: Enable logging by using Foundry Local.
options.C: Route requests through the Azure OpenAI endpoint.

questions.explanation: Application tracing moi bao phu end-to-end across model call va tool invocation trong workflow.

questions.question: Identical prompts must return consistent responses to prevent automated test failures. You need to reduce response variability without modifying the prompt or reducing factual accuracy.

options.C: Remove stop sequences from the requests.

questions.explanation: Temperature thap lam output on dinh va it ngau nhien hon.

questions.question: The agent uses a memory store and a memory search tool. You need to ensure that the conversation history does not persist across separate sessions. To what should you set the scope of the memory tool?
questions.explanation: Session scope chi giu memory trong pham vi phien hien tai, khong luu sang session khac.

questions.question: Before sending prompts to the model, App1 must retrieve documents by using Azure AI Search. Multiple client applications must use the same search configuration, key-based auth must be prevented, and admin effort minimized.

options.A: Configure an Azure AI Search connection in Project1 and reference the connection in each application.
options.B: Create a custom HTTP connection in Foundry and manually configure Azure AI Search endpoints per application.
options.C: Enable a managed identity for each application and call Azure AI Search directly.
options.D: Call Azure AI Search directly from each application by using Microsoft Entra authentication.

answer.text: Configure an Azure AI Search connection in Project1 and reference the connection in each application.

questions.explanation: Project-level connection giup tai su dung cau hinh tap trung va co the dung auth hien dai thay cho keys.

questions.question: Run a pre-production evaluation by using a labeled CSV dataset that contains the query, content, response, and ground truth. Measure whether responses address the user query, whether responses are supported by the provided content, and whether responses contain sensitive or proprietary information.
questions.explanation: Groundedness + relevance do muc do tra loi dung cau hoi va co ho tro tu content; protected material do nguy co lo/tao noi dung duoc bao ho.

questions.question: The agent has both Azure AI Search and web search tools. You need to ensure that for a specific run, the agent deterministically retrieves information only from the internet. To what should you set tool_choice?
questions.explanation: Chi dinh cu the tool bing grounding de agent buoc phai dung internet search.

questions.question: You need to improve classification accuracy by showing the model how correct classifications look, without retraining the model or storing knowledge permanently.
questions.explanation: Few-shot cho model xem vi du dung ngay trong prompt ma khong can retrain.

questions.question: You need deterministic, step-based processing with conditional branching and shared state across three agents, while minimizing development effort.

options.B: separate agent runs coordinated in the application code
options.C: threads and runs without a workflow

questions.explanation: Workflow la cach phu hop nhat cho deterministic orchestration co branching va shared state.

questions.question: Users report slow requests and incorrect responses even when the knowledge API returns expected data. You need to inspect individual agent runs to view the ordered sequence of LLM calls, tool invocations, and timing information.
questions.explanation: Tracing hien thi thu tu cac buoc runtime va timing chi tiet trong tung run.

questions.question: Add an automated pre-production evaluation step for a RAG chat solution. The pipeline must fail if unsupported content or a retrieval mismatch exceeds a threshold. Which two built-in evaluators should you use?
questions.explanation: Retrieval evaluator bat retrieval mismatch; groundedness bat unsupported content.

questions.question: Unsafe images and hidden instructions embedded in images can manipulate a multimodal model. Solution: configure a prompt shield for user prompts. Does this meet the goal?
questions.explanation: User prompt shield khong xu ly day du ca unsafe images va indirect prompt injection trong image content.

questions.question: Unsafe images and hidden instructions embedded in images can manipulate a multimodal model. Solution: configure protected material detection. Does this meet the goal?
questions.explanation: Protected material detection khong giai quyet image safety hoac prompt injection.

questions.question: Unsafe images and hidden instructions embedded in images can manipulate a multimodal model. Solution: configure a prompt shield for documents. Does this meet the goal?
questions.explanation: Prompt shield for documents giup giam indirect prompt injection, nhung chua xu ly unsafe images theo muc do harmful content.

questions.question: Unsafe images and hidden instructions embedded in images can manipulate a multimodal model. Solution: configure image moderation to block unsafe content before processing the images. Does this meet the goal?
questions.explanation: Image moderation xu ly unsafe image nhung khong giai quyet hidden instruction / prompt injection.

questions.question: An agent generates summaries from retrieved policy documents, but some responses omit required regulatory clauses even when the clauses are present in the retrieved content. Solution: add a reflection pass that regenerates the response if required clauses are missing. Does this meet the goal?
questions.explanation: Reflection/regeneration voi kiem tra completeness la cach hop ly de cai thien do day du cua response.

questions.question: An agent generates summaries from retrieved policy documents, but some responses omit required regulatory clauses even when the clauses are present in the retrieved content. Solution: increase the temperature parameter. Does this meet the goal?
questions.explanation: Tang temperature tang tinh ngau nhien, khong phai bien phap nham cai thien completeness mot cach on dinh.
